scenario.name: Trunk Delayed Offer with UPDATE and re-INVITE
scenario.send: INVITE sip:[service]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=tcp SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/TCP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:[key_from_user]@[key_from_domain]>;tag=[call_number][pid] To: <sip:[service]@[remote_ip]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] INVITE Contact: <sip:[key_from_user]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=tcp> Max-Forwards: 70 Session-Expires: 900;refresher=uac Min-SE: 900 Supported: timer,replaces Allow: INVITE,ACK,CANCEL,BYE,UPDATE,INFO,OPTIONS,REFER,NOTIFY User-Agent: OCSBC-E-CZ8.4.0 Content-Length: 0

ACK [next_url] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/TCP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:[key_from_user]@[key_from_domain]>;tag=[call_number][pid] [last_To:] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] ACK [routes] Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=tandberg 0 1 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=- b=AS:2048 t=0 0 a=cisco-mari-rate a=cisco-mari:v1 m=audio 16384 RTP/AVP 9 0 8 101 c=IN IP4 [local_ip] a=rtpmap:9 G722/8000 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=sendrecv a=rtcp:16385 a=ptime:20 m=video 16386 RTP/AVP 97 126 c=IN IP4 [local_ip] b=TIAS:1984000 a=rtpmap:97 H264/90000 a=fmtp:97 profile-level-id=428016;max-mbps=490000;max-fs=8160;max-cpb=200;max-dpb=16320;max-br=5000;max-smbps=490000;max-fps=6000;packetization-mode=0 a=rtpmap:126 H264/90000 a=fmtp:126 profile-level-id=428016;max-mbps=490000;max-fs=8160;max-cpb=200;max-dpb=16320;max-br=5000;max-smbps=490000;max-fps=6000;packetization-mode=1 a=rtcp-fb:* ccm pan a=rtcp-fb:* nack pli a=label:11 a=sendrecv a=rtcp:16387 a=ptime:20 m=application 16388 UDP/BFCP * c=IN IP4 [local_ip] a=floorctrl:c-only m=video 16390 RTP/AVP 97 126 c=IN IP4 [local_ip] b=TIAS:1984000 a=rtpmap:97 H264/90000 a=fmtp:97 profile-level-id=428016;max-mbps=259200;max-fs=32400;max-cpb=200;max-dpb=64800;max-br=5000;max-smbps=259200;max-fps=6000;packetization-mode=0 a=rtpmap:126 H264/90000 a=fmtp:126 profile-level-id=428016;max-mbps=259200;max-fs=32400;max-cpb=200;max-dpb=64800;max-br=5000;max-smbps=259200;max-fps=6000;packetization-mode=1 a=rtcp-fb:* nack pli a=content:slides a=label:12 a=recvonly a=rtcp:16391 a=ptime:20 m=application 0 RTP/AVP 0 c=IN IP4 0.0.0.0

INFO [next_url] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/TCP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:[key_from_user]@[key_from_domain]>;tag=[call_number][pid] [last_To:] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] INFO [routes] Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Type: application/dtmf-relay Content-Length: [len]

UPDATE [next_url] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/TCP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:[key_from_user]@[key_from_domain]>;tag=[call_number][pid] [last_To:] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] UPDATE [routes] Contact: <sip:[key_from_user]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=tcp> Max-Forwards: 70 Session-Expires: 900;refresher=uac Min-SE: 900 Supported: timer Content-Length: 0

INVITE [next_url] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/TCP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:[key_from_user]@[key_from_domain]>;tag=[call_number][pid] [last_To:] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] INVITE [routes] Contact: <sip:[key_from_user]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=tcp> Max-Forwards: 70 Session-Expires: 900;refresher=uac Supported: timer Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=tandberg 0 2 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=- b=AS:2048 t=0 0 m=audio 16384 RTP/AVP 9 0 8 101 c=IN IP4 [local_ip] a=rtpmap:9 G722/8000 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=fmtp:101 0-15 a=sendrecv a=rtcp:16385 a=ptime:20 m=video 16386 RTP/AVP 97 126 c=IN IP4 [local_ip] b=TIAS:1984000 a=rtpmap:97 H264/90000 a=fmtp:97 profile-level-id=428016;max-mbps=490000;max-fs=8160;packetization-mode=0 a=rtpmap:126 H264/90000 a=fmtp:126 profile-level-id=428016;max-mbps=490000;max-fs=8160;packetization-mode=1 a=sendrecv a=rtcp:16387 a=ptime:20 m=application 16388 UDP/BFCP * c=IN IP4 [local_ip] a=floorctrl:c-only m=video 16390 RTP/AVP 97 126 c=IN IP4 [local_ip] b=TIAS:1984000 a=rtpmap:97 H264/90000 a=fmtp:97 profile-level-id=428016;max-mbps=259200;max-fs=32400;packetization-mode=0 a=rtpmap:126 H264/90000 a=fmtp:126 profile-level-id=428016;max-mbps=259200;max-fs=32400;packetization-mode=1 a=content:slides a=label:12 a=recvonly a=rtcp:16391 a=ptime:20 m=application 0 RTP/AVP 0 c=IN IP4 0.0.0.0

ACK [next_url] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/TCP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:[key_from_user]@[key_from_domain]>;tag=[call_number][pid] [last_To:] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] ACK [routes] Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0

BYE [next_url] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/TCP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:[key_from_user]@[key_from_domain]>;tag=[call_number][pid] [last_To:] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] BYE [routes] Max-Forwards: 70 Reason: SIP ;cause=200;text="Normal call clearing" Content-Length: 0

BYE [next_url] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/TCP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:[key_from_user]@[key_from_domain]>;tag=[call_number][pid] [last_To:] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] BYE [routes] Max-Forwards: 70 Reason: SIP ;cause=408;text="Failed to send out mid-dialog request due to a transaction timeout" Content-Length: 0

BYE [next_url] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/TCP [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:[key_from_user]@[key_from_domain]>;tag=[call_number][pid] [last_To:] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] BYE [routes] Max-Forwards: 70 Reason: SIP ;cause=408;text="re-INVITE timeout - screenshare failure" Content-Length: 0
